appearance.hair: long, straight black hair cascading past shoulders and chest
appearance.face: soft youthful face, full lips, subtle pout
appearance.makeup: light natural makeup, occasional bold looks

style.aesthetic: young adult e-girl / alt / casual sexy
style.vibe: casual and intimate atmosphere, amateur vibe with minor imperfections

restrictions.cosplay_note: Outfits must be complete and intact, clearly cosplay-focused rather than lingerie

structure: 1. Trigger word + scene setting (location, mood, lighting color)
2. Background description (room details, furniture, depth of field)
4. Outfit description (detailed, fabric textures, colors, fit)
5. Pose and hands (what she is doing, where hands are placed)
7. Lighting details (light source, shadows, color temperature, atmosphere)
tips: Describe outfit in extreme detail (fabric, color, fit, brand-style)
Include specific lighting setup (neon color, direction, intensity)
Mention camera level and framing (eye-level, chest-level, full body)
Add atmosphere words (cozy, intimate, amateur, candid)
More detail = better accuracy, aim for 500-1000 characters
